subject: Mitch McConnell just did something sneaky (rule 14)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Mitch McConnell is trying to fast track the Republican Obamacare repeal bill and it's on us to stop him.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170611-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
**_Los Angeles Times: "While you watched Comey, Senate GOP moved to cripple healthcare"_**
Team,

While James Comey was testifying, Mitch McConnell did something sneaky, and thought you wouldn't notice.

McConnell started the process known as Rule 14, which will allow the GOP health care repeal bill to bypass committees and standard procedures. Now, the bill can be sent directly to the floor for a vote as early as next week -- which means access to affordable health care is at risk more than ever before.

**Once again, Republicans are bending the Senate rules to ram through Trump 's agenda.**

[**Chip in $1 right now to help fund our ads and do whatever it takes to stop Republicans from ripping away health coverage from 23 million people.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170611-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This behavior is reckless and irresponsible -- and it's not the first time Republicans decided to manipulate the rules since Trump's election.

When Democrats passed the Affordable Care Act, they held a long series of public hearings to ensure the American people were kept informed.

But now McConnell's decision to invoke Rule 14 opens the door for Obamacare to be repealed rapidly and with a disturbing lack of transparency.

**McConnell 's decision to fast-track Obamacare repeal means a vote could come as early as this week. Chip in $1 right now to fund our ads pressuring Republicans as we make a final push to save Obamacare:**

[**http://dscc.org/final-fight-to-save-Obamacare**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170611-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This fight will be one of the toughest yet -- but with your support we can hold Republicans accountable and stop them from taking away our health care.

Thanks,

Team DSCC

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. subject: Wishing POTUS a Happy Birthday!

body:
Have you signed the card yet, Peter? |

Peter,

President Trump's first birthday in the White House is coming up and we wanted to be sure you had a chance to sign the official birthday card.

We always celebrate with family and friends, and your support has been unwavering as we fight to advance our America First agenda.

[**To sign the card and add your personal birthday message to President Trump, please be sure to do here so before 9:00 PM on June 14, 2017.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/ottcrgzplvfdwgwgdknkzdszmsdpmmkncjwkjtstjkwkft_kdhlddfsstv.html?a=1260&b=87875&c=17786605)

We couldn't have come this far without you, Peter, and we know the President will be thrilled to see your name.

[**So please, join the millions of Americans who have already signed the card for President Trump and include your personal birthday message before 9:00 PM on June 14, 2017.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/xdvnjlvybmgtrlrltpqpvtkvsktysspqnhrphdkdhprpgv_kdhlddfsstv.html?a=1260&b=87875&c=17786605)

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

P.S. - We'll be putting the list together at 9:00 PM Wednesday night to _**HAND-DELIVER**_ to the President. name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/12/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc0271f9286b60ea25653aef80d85a8438fb425cd3b2fa94761e1a45413d483f5021615ae8ee334b5569a4ea9a004c2777e5ef

President Donald J. Trump is dedicating this week to workforce development. Across the United States there exists a skills gap that must be addressed. Americans are unemployed and seeking employment, and companies are struggling to fill vacancies for positions that require varying levels of skill and training. President Trump's Administration is committed to closing the skills gap and ensuring Americans are trained for the jobs available and the jobs of the future.

Today's Events

9:30 AM: President Trump receives a National Security Council briefing

11:00 AM: President Trump leads a Cabinet Meeting

12:30 PM: President Trump has lunch with Vice President Mike Pence

1:30 PM: Press Briefing with Press Secretary Sean Spicer -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc027131b9cf356d410ee146bd6e80f0190a50dda4ffef77e475878deab1ebba8cca08d524019dc8e8040069c30399a303a1e8
Watch

3:00 PM: President Trump welcomes the 2016 NCAA Football National Champions: The Clemson Tigers -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc0271f858ad3ebc7823a281113063064971bb3928d670365de8cea606184670e3331715ebaa9b67f2acbe72e50c746cfa6c89
Watch

Photo of the Day

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc0271818714749dcd52e944051b5a00fa11ae87599fe9462a8c2f48010bf6a9a71e67db7f1ec63da2eb7cc79f18ff57eb4c20

President Donald J. Trump | June 9, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

WHITE HOUSE UPDATES

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc02711e3b3d4ce8a5e1b27d0748ceacf65104c9e74c2c04d794fbc4954720954b6e00c073efd2f24f68cca7b4be513a72514b

On Friday, President Trump welcomed President Iohannis of Romania to the White House, where they discussed
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc02712c2d6103f61cf42f897f128976d0397cb29c863fce538c1a499726e6d155010899cb6686fcaed371bb5215c931c18140
strengthening their strategic partnership in the fight against terrorism.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc02719866ee023c15d1de21e35388c515e8de94ff9323c52f642afd8dec5f10004b8f25eb788a004bdf26b987da018eaf36f5

On Friday, President Trump detailed his
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc0271797f0cbd49da3f4b70e8fdeda663d826f1b06e7472f20d65a171ea68b6db5379aaf391358a30f1373d96c5beb83315a4
plan to provide infrastructure regulatory relief so state and local leaders have more power to decide which projects get built, when they start, and how they are funded.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc0271f3cb699e5e45e6d0c8e076ce034fc1c670635cc8f1ddbd2bfc91f8eded746d0812829d06e08978cf27c8740319e19756

Last week, President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc0271bb55882ed9aeba245588dc7391f9a735724c95d3a193298660cdcf2af20c9c1b17b3a109dca2c8fcb672a573a0e62a0b
delivered remarks at the Faith and Freedom Coalition's Road to Majority Conference where he renewed his commitment to fight for the freedoms of all Americans and to put America first.

What We Are Reading

"America's small-business owners are highly confident about their prospects for the next year and optimistic about the state of the U.S. economy..."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3c8bf916d9cc02715bed79139d124158407c311c57e20cbe6065c4b0e462cfa6b7553abbaa58c194ab494bf4dda871af442bcc547dacbcad
CNBC

"The Trump administration has made approval of natural gas exports a key part of its energy and national security strategy. The U.S. is the world's top producer of oil and gas due to the fracking and shale energy boom."
-

Washington Examiner

"By approaching the nation's infrastructure problem like a businessman, Trump can actually deliver the goods — without spending the country into bankruptcy — by focusing on the real cause: Big Government itself. "
-

Investor's Business Daily

Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

name: Team Kaine
subject: Comey under oath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

**Last week, former FBI director James Comey testified in front of Congress about the events leading up to his shocking dismissal by President Trump.**

None of us ever expected to hear a former FBI director saying the things Comey did. Loyalty oaths. Potential abuses of power. More questions about whether this pattern may even be obstruction of justice.

**[Now, more than ever, the Senate needs to fulfill its constitutional role as a check and balance against a president who abuses his power. We need fighters like Tim in office holding Trump accountable -- make a contribution to keep him in the Senate today.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=aWu8NW%2BFiE87JYUaQ70j%2F92T08A1SayY)**

What happens next is anyone's guess, but it's safe to say Trump is going to continue to demean American institutions, from the judiciary to the press -- it's up to us to push back.

Tim is fighting for us in the Senate, and we need to have his back. While he and the rest of Senate Democrats are getting to the bottom of what went on between Trump and Comey behind closed doors, we can build our resources for the fight that we know is coming.

**[Make a grassroots contribution today.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8roLTLuNkDog2pvRxDdW%2F92T08A1SayY)**

Thanks,

Team Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NVoJV%2FsGnD1tfAgEFqGAid2T08A1SayY)

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Mitch McConnell's secret health care repeal
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Senate Republicans are negotiating in secret to repeal health care. Tell them to show us the bill now.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Show-Us-The-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170612_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170612_dnc2_rem")**
**[Derek, there's never been a more important moment to take action on health care.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Show-Us-The-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112"&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+CUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistcommaletterkey&utm_campaign=em_20170612_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170612_dnc2_rem")**

Last week, Mitch McConnell invoked "rule 14" to allow Senate Republicans to rush through their health care repeal without anyone seeing it -- no public hearings, no chance to read the bill.

It's the same playbook Paul Ryan and House Republicans used to ram repeal through the House (and then celebrate with Donald Trump). So there's a good chance the Senate is going to end up with a similar disastrous bill that will:

* leave 23 million Americans uninsured
* slash funding for Medicaid
* let insurance companies deny insurance for people with pre-existing conditions

**Don't let the GOP get away with sneaking this health care bill through the Senate. Add your name to demand Senate Republicans show us the bill:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Show-Us-The-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170612_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170612_dnc2_rem")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc46/4067b0a/2b476e360/7e69a149/652246805/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170612_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170612_dnc2_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc46/4067b0a/2b476e360/7e69a156/652246805/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170612_dnc2_rem&source=em_20170612_dnc2_rem"). | | Peter,

The next generation of Hoosiers depend on strong public schools where they can learn and grow. Public education will be the backbone that creates a better future for Indiana.

But President Trump and Betsy DeVos don't agree. The Trump-DeVos education budget would cut $9.2 billion from public schools and instead move the government's focus towards private and charter schools.

**What does that mean? Less funding for afterschool programs in struggling areas. School districts that can 't afford mental health services for students or anti-bullying programs. More teachers who are stretched too thin, and too many struggling students.** **[Sign our petition, and tell Trump and DeVos these cuts are unacceptable.>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2637/7377f838/3653ec29/51fb7333/2687641315/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/trumpdevosbudget/?code=donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjd-devos%3Frefcode%3D20170612%26amount%3D25")**

Peter, this budget would devastate our education system -- and the kids who depend on it. We can't stand by and watch Indiana's legacy of public education be harmed by mindless cuts.

subject: The Hill: Senate GOP sees path to Obamacare repeal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republicans are bending Senate rules to fast track the Republican Obamacare repeal bill and this is the week to stop them.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170612-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
**_The Hill: Senate GOP sees path to Obamacare repeal_**
Team,

Obamacare repeal is moving fast and a vote could happen any day now.

**Because Mitch McConnell bypassed the normal Senate process by invoking an obscure procedure called Rule 14,** all with an eye on passing Obamacare repeal with 50 Republicans and a tie-breaking vote from Mike Pence -- **no public hearings or debate will take place.**

It's no secret why Republicans are keeping their plans hidden. Their disaster of a bill is deeply unpopular, even with Republicans, and the more the public knows about it, the less they like it.

[**This is our last chance to shine a light on the GOP 's secret efforts to repeal Obamacare. Chip in $1 to help fund our ads and hold Republicans accountable for trying to take health care away from 23 million Americans.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170612-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Republicans are deliberately keeping their health care negotiations out of public view to avoid opposition until they can gather the votes to pass it. They saw this playbook work in the House and now, they're counting on it to end Obamacare.

If this bill passes, millions of people will lose insurance coverage or face skyrocketing costs.

We need to let Republicans know that they will pay a price in 2018 if they execute this reckless plan -- and we need YOUR help to preview the backlash that awaits them.

**Chip in $1 right now to fund our ads and show Republicans that no matter how hard they try to hide, we 'll hold them accountable for working to repeal Obamacare:**

[**http://dscc.org/fight-to-save-Obamacare**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170612-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

From the minute Trump was elected we knew that the fight to save Obamacare would be our biggest challenge -- and it's happening -- _right now_. We can't stand by while Mitch McConnell's secret plan is in motion, we need all hands on deck.

Thanks for standing with us,

Team DSCC
